name: Indoctrinated

granted_abilities.name: Demise (A New Voice)
granted_abilities.text: After this model is killed, summon a Propagandist in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: The card shows 'This model gains the following ability:' followed by Demise ability
The card shows 'This model gains the following trigger on all its attack actions:' followed by 'Blinded to Reason' trigger
The Blinded to Reason trigger appears to be: (c) Blinded to Reason: This trigger must be declared, if able. Deal 2 damage to this model. When resolving, this action deals +2 damage to the target.

However, since triggers are associated with actions and not standalone, and the card states this trigger is added to 'all its attack actions', this cannot be properly represented in the granted_actions array as it modifies the attached model's existing actions rather than granting new ones.
The trigger has been omitted from the JSON as it's a modification to existing model actions, not a granted action from the upgrade itself.
